'''Tarnis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] who hijacked a load of specialized processing chips from [[Tendrando Arms]] new rehab [[Droid/Legends|droid]] factory. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Tendra Risant Calrissian]] put up a million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] reward for the chips. Tarnis may have been captain of the ''[[Starsong]]'', for it was the ship in which he and his crew left on after [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] asked too many questions about the [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]] strike team members.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
